parameters.name: Workspaces
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
resources
| where type =~ 'microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces'
| project id, label = name, selected = true

parameters.name: SelectedVM
parameters.label: VM Filter
parameters.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1d)
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer
| order by Computer asc
| project value = tolower(Computer), label = Computer

content.json:
## 🏠 Overview — Fleet Health
Heartbeat-based host status and active threshold alerts.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), OS = any(OSType) by Computer
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen >= ago(5m), '✅ Up', '🔴 Down')
| extend MinAgo = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen)
| project Computer, Status, OS, LastSeen, MinAgo
| order by Status asc, Computer asc
content.title: Host Up / Down Status

content.json:
### 📋 Alert Thresholds & Legend

| Icon | Metric | Fires When | How It's Measured | Window |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| 🔴 | **CPU** | Avg utilization **> {CpuThreshold}%** | Average across all cores | Last 15 min |
| 🟠 | **Memory** | Avg used **> {MemThreshold}%** | `AvailableMB ÷ total RAM` — invalid data silently dropped | Last 15 min |
| 🟡 | **Disk** | **Any mount** free **< {DiskThreshold}%** | Min free % per mount point | Last 15 min |

> ✅ **Empty table = healthy fleet.**

> ⚙️ Adjust thresholds using the pills above.

content.query:
let CPU = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| summarize AvgVal = round(avg(Val), 1) by Computer
| where AvgVal > toint('{CpuThreshold}')
| extend Alert = strcat('🔴 CPU > {CpuThreshold}% (', AvgVal, '%)'), Metric = 'CPU';
let MEM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = (1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgVal = round(avg(UsedPct), 1) by Computer
| where AvgVal > toint('{MemThreshold}')
| extend Alert = strcat('🟠 Mem > {MemThreshold}% (', AvgVal, '%)'), Metric = 'Memory';
let DISK = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated > ago(15m)
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize MinFree = round(min(Val), 1) by Computer, Disk
| where MinFree < toint('{DiskThreshold}')
| summarize
    CriticalMounts = strcat_array(make_list(strcat(Disk, ' (', tostring(MinFree), '%)')), ', ')
  by Computer
| extend Alert = strcat('🟡 Disk < {DiskThreshold}% free — ', CriticalMounts), Metric = 'Disk';
union CPU, MEM, DISK
| project Computer, Metric, Alert
| order by Computer asc, Metric asc
content.title: Active Threshold Alerts — last 15 min

content.json:
## 💻 Performance & Availability
Fleet heartbeat status with CPU, Memory, Disk and Network metrics.

> 👆 **Click any VM row** to filter all charts to that VM. Use the 🔄 refresh icon to reset to fleet view.

content.query:
Heartbeat
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize
    LastSeen   = max(TimeGenerated),
    OS         = any(OSType),
    Heartbeats = count()
  by Computer
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Status = iff(LastSeen >= ago(5m), '✅ Online', '🔴 Offline')
| extend MinAgo = datetime_diff('minute', now(), LastSeen)
| project Computer, NormalizedComputer, Status, OS, LastSeen, MinAgo, Heartbeats
| order by Status asc, Computer asc
content.title: Fleet Availability — 👆 Click a VM to drill into its metrics

content.json:
### 📌 Filtered to: **{DrillVM}**
*Select a row above to filter — showing all VMs when no row is selected.*

---

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Computer asc
content.title: CPU Utilization %

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgMemPct = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Computer asc
content.title: Memory Used %

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize Value = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Computer, Disk
| where isnotnull(Value)
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Disk)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: Disk Free %

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val), 2), MaxCPU = round(max(Val), 2), P95CPU = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by Computer
| extend CPUAlert = iff(P95CPU > 85, '🔴 High', iff(P95CPU > 60, '🟡 Medium', '🟢 Normal'))
| order by P95CPU desc
content.title: CPU Summary — Avg / Max / P95

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize CurrentFree = round(avg(Val), 1), MinFree = round(min(Val), 1), MaxFree = round(max(Val), 1) by Computer, Disk
| extend DiskStatus = iff(CurrentFree < 10, '🔴 Critical', iff(CurrentFree < 20, '🟡 Warning', '🟢 OK'))
| order by Computer asc, CurrentFree asc
content.title: Disk Free % — All Mount Points

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Interface = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/networkDeviceId'])
| extend MBps = round(Val / 1048576, 4)
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Interface)
| summarize Value = round(avg(MBps), 4) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Series
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Network Read (MBps)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network' and Name == 'WriteBytesPerSecond'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend Interface = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/networkDeviceId'])
| extend MBps = round(Val / 1048576, 4)
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Interface)
| summarize Value = round(avg(MBps), 4) by bin(TimeGenerated, 5m), Series
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Network Write (MBps)

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Network' and Name in ('ReadBytesPerSecond','WriteBytesPerSecond')
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| where isempty('{DrillVM}') or Computer =~ '{DrillVM}'
| extend MBps = Val / 1048576
| summarize AvgMBps = round(avg(MBps), 4), MaxMBps = round(max(MBps), 4) by Computer, Name
| extend Direction = iff(Name == 'ReadBytesPerSecond', '⬇️ Read', '⬆️ Write')
| project Computer, Direction, AvgMBps, MaxMBps
| order by Computer asc, Direction asc
content.title: Network Summary — Avg & Max MBps

content.json:
## 🖥 Services — Inventory & Changes
Searchable service inventory with change history.

> ⚠️ Requires the **ChangeTracking** solution on the Log Analytics Workspace.

> 💡 Shows **all VMs** reporting CT data. Use Search box to filter by computer.

👆 **Click any row** to filter change history to that service.

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| summarize
    SvcState       = take_any(SvcState),
    SvcStartupType = take_any(SvcStartupType)
  by Computer, SvcName
| summarize
    Running       = countif(SvcState == 'Running'),
    Stopped       = countif(SvcState == 'Stopped'),
    Disabled      = countif(SvcStartupType == 'Disabled'),
    Unknown       = countif(not(SvcState in ('Running','Stopped'))),
    TotalVMs      = dcount(Computer),
    TotalServices = count()
| project TotalServices, TotalVMs, Running, Stopped, Disabled, Unknown
content.title: Service State Summary

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| summarize
    LastSeen       = max(TimeGenerated),
    SvcDisplayName = take_any(SvcDisplayName),
    SvcState       = take_any(SvcState),
    SvcStartupType = take_any(SvcStartupType),
    SvcAccount     = take_any(SvcAccount)
  by Computer, SvcName
| extend StateIcon = case(
    SvcState == 'Running',                              '✅ Running',
    SvcState == 'Stopped' and SvcStartupType == 'Auto', '🔴 Stopped (Auto-start!)',
    SvcState == 'Stopped',                              '🟠 Stopped',
    SvcStartupType == 'Disabled',                       '⬛ Disabled',
                                                         '🟡 Unknown')
| extend StartupIcon = case(
    SvcStartupType == 'Auto',     '🟢 Auto',
    SvcStartupType == 'Manual',   '🔵 Manual',
    SvcStartupType == 'Disabled', '⬛ Disabled',
                                   '❓ Unknown')
| project Computer,
    DisplayName    = SvcDisplayName,
    ServiceKey     = SvcName,
    StateIcon,
    StartupIcon,
    ServiceAccount = SvcAccount,
    LastUpdated    = LastSeen
| order by Computer asc, StateIcon asc, DisplayName asc
content.title: Service Inventory — Current State  🔍 Click a row to see its change history

content.query:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices'
| where isempty('{SelectedService}') or SvcName =~ '{SelectedService}'
| where isempty('{ServiceComputer}')  or Computer =~ '{ServiceComputer}'
| extend ChangeIcon = case(
    ChangeCategory == 'Added',    '➕ Added',
    ChangeCategory == 'Removed',  '➖ Removed',
    ChangeCategory == 'Modified', '✏️ Modified',
                                   '❓ Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer,
    DisplayName   = SvcDisplayName,
    ServiceKey    = SvcName,
    ChangeIcon,
    PreviousState = Previous,
    CurrentState  = Current
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: Change History — {SelectedService}

content.query:
ConfigurationData
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigDataType == 'WindowsServices'
| summarize
    SvcState       = take_any(SvcState),
    SvcStartupType = take_any(SvcStartupType)
  by Computer, SvcName
| summarize
    Total    = count(),
    Running  = countif(SvcState == 'Running'),
    Stopped  = countif(SvcState == 'Stopped'),
    Disabled = countif(SvcStartupType == 'Disabled')
  by Computer
| extend StoppedPct = round(todouble(Stopped) / Total * 100, 1)
| order by Stopped desc, Computer asc
content.title: Services by Computer — Running / Stopped / Disabled

content.query:
ConfigurationChange
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfigChangeType == 'WindowsServices'
| extend ChangeIcon = case(
    ChangeCategory == 'Added',    '➕ Added',
    ChangeCategory == 'Removed',  '➖ Removed',
    ChangeCategory == 'Modified', '✏️ Modified',
                                   '❓ Other')
| project TimeGenerated, Computer,
    DisplayName   = SvcDisplayName,
    ServiceKey    = SvcName,
    ChangeIcon,
    PreviousState = Previous,
    CurrentState  = Current
| order by TimeGenerated desc
content.title: All Recent Service Changes

content.json:
## 📈 Capacity Planning

Disk trends, days-until-full, CPU/Memory P95 baselines, and rightsizing analysis.

> 🛡️ **v27 — FQDN fix:** Heartbeat table now exports normalized short name (not FQDN) to DrillVM parameter — fixes blank performance charts in customer environments where Heartbeat returns FQDN but InsightsMetrics uses short name.

### 📋 How to Read These Panels

| Panel | What It Shows | How to Use It |
|---|---|---|
| **Disk Free % Trend** | Actual disk free % per mount (hourly avg) | Look for downward slopes |
| **Days Until Full** | Linear projection to 0% free | Sort `DaysUntilFull` asc; `DataPoints` = confidence |
| **Memory Avg & P95** | Named series: `Computer — Avg` / `Computer — P95` | P95 = sustained load |
| **CPU Avg & P95** | Named series: `Computer — Avg` / `Computer — P95` | P95 > {CpuHighThreshold}% = undersized |
| **Sizing Summary** | Avg / P95 / Max per VM with flags | All VMs shown |
| **Rightsizing Alerts** | Only VMs outside target band | Empty = all right-sized |

### ⚙️ Rightsizing Threshold Pills

| Pill | Default | Meaning |
|---|---|---|
| **CPU Overloaded %** | 80% | P95 CPU **above** this → undersized |
| **CPU Underutilized %** | 20% | P95 CPU **below** this → oversized |
| **Mem Overloaded %** | 85% | P95 Mem **above** this → undersized |
| **Mem Underutilized %** | 30% | P95 Mem **below** this → oversized |

> 💡 Right-sized = P95 CPU in **{CpuLowThreshold}%–{CpuHighThreshold}%** AND P95 Mem in **{MemLowThreshold}%–{MemHighThreshold}%**

content.query:
InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize Value = round(avg(Val), 1) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer, Disk
| where isnotnull(Value)
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — ', Disk)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: Disk Free % Trend — Actual Data (hourly avg per mount)

content.query:
let raw = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'LogicalDisk' and Name == 'FreeSpacePercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend Disk = tostring(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/mountId'])
| extend Disk = iff(isempty(Disk), 'unknown', Disk)
| where not(Disk startswith '/snap' or Disk startswith '/sys' or Disk startswith '/proc' or Disk startswith '/dev' or Disk startswith '/run')
| summarize HourlyAvg = avg(todouble(Val)) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer, Disk
| where isnotnull(HourlyAvg);
let stats = raw
| summarize
    MinFree    = round(min(HourlyAvg), 1),
    MaxFree    = round(max(HourlyAvg), 1),
    SpanHours  = round(todouble(datetime_diff('minute', max(TimeGenerated), min(TimeGenerated))) / 60.0, 2),
    DataPoints = count()
  by Computer, Disk;
let first_val = raw
| summarize FirstTime = min(TimeGenerated) by Computer, Disk
| join kind=inner raw on Computer, Disk
| where TimeGenerated == FirstTime
| summarize FirstFree = round(avg(HourlyAvg), 1) by Computer, Disk;
let last_val = raw
| summarize LastTime = max(TimeGenerated) by Computer, Disk
| join kind=inner raw on Computer, Disk
| where TimeGenerated == LastTime
| summarize CurrentFree = round(avg(HourlyAvg), 1) by Computer, Disk;
stats
| join kind=inner first_val on Computer, Disk
| join kind=inner last_val  on Computer, Disk
| extend SpanDays    = iff(SpanHours > 0.5, SpanHours / 24.0, real(null))
| extend DailyDrop   = iff(
    isnotnull(SpanDays) and isnotnull(FirstFree ) and isnotnull(CurrentFree),
    round((todouble(FirstFree) - todouble(CurrentFree)) / SpanDays, 2),
    real(null))
| extend DaysUntilFull = iff(
    isnotnull(DailyDrop) and DailyDrop > 0.05 and isnotnull(CurrentFree),
    round(todouble(CurrentFree) / DailyDrop, 0),
    real(null))
| extend Projection = case(
    isnull(DaysUntilFull),       '✅ Stable / Growing',
    DaysUntilFull <= 7,          strcat('🔴 CRITICAL — ', tostring(toint(DaysUntilFull)), ' days'),
    DaysUntilFull <= 30,         strcat('🟠 Warning — ', tostring(toint(DaysUntilFull)), ' days'),
    DaysUntilFull <= 90,         strcat('🟡 Watch — ', tostring(toint(DaysUntilFull)), ' days'),
                                  strcat('🟢 OK — ', tostring(toint(DaysUntilFull)), ' days'))
| project Computer, Disk, CurrentFree, MinFree, MaxFree, DailyDrop, DaysUntilFull, DataPoints, Projection
| order by DaysUntilFull asc, Computer asc, Disk asc
content.title: Disk Capacity — Days Until Full (linear projection)

content.query:
let BASE = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = round((1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0, 2)
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct);
let AVG = BASE
| summarize Value = round(avg(UsedPct), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — Avg');
let P95 = BASE
| summarize Value = round(percentile(UsedPct, 95), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — P95');
union AVG, P95
| where isnotnull(Value)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: Memory Used % — Avg & P95 per VM (hourly)

content.query:
let AVG = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize Value = round(avg(Val), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — Avg');
let P95 = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize Value = round(percentile(Val, 95), 2) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h), Computer
| extend Series = strcat(Computer, ' — P95');
union AVG, P95
| where isnotnull(Value)
| project TimeGenerated, Series, Value
| order by TimeGenerated asc, Series asc
content.title: CPU Utilization % — Avg & P95 per VM (hourly)

content.query:
let CPU = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val),1), P95CPU = round(percentile(Val,95),1), MaxCPU = round(max(Val),1) by Computer;
let MEM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = (1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgMem = round(avg(UsedPct),1), P95Mem = round(percentile(UsedPct,95),1), MaxMem = round(max(UsedPct),1) by Computer;
CPU
| join kind=leftouter MEM on Computer
| extend CPUSizing = case(
    P95CPU > toint('{CpuHighThreshold}'), '🔴 Overloaded — Undersized',
    P95CPU < toint('{CpuLowThreshold}'),  '🔵 Underutilized — Oversized',
                                           '🟢 Right-sized')
| extend MemSizing = case(
    P95Mem > toint('{MemHighThreshold}'), '🔴 Overloaded — Undersized',
    P95Mem < toint('{MemLowThreshold}'),  '🔵 Underutilized — Oversized',
                                           '🟢 Right-sized')
| project Computer, AvgCPU, P95CPU, MaxCPU, CPUSizing, AvgMem, P95Mem, MaxMem, MemSizing
| order by P95CPU desc
content.title: CPU & Memory Sizing Summary — P95 Baseline

content.json:
### ⚠️ Rightsizing Alerts
VMs outside target band **[{CpuLowThreshold}%–{CpuHighThreshold}% CPU]** **[{MemLowThreshold}%–{MemHighThreshold}% Memory]**.

Empty = all VMs right-sized.

| Flag | Meaning | Action |
|---|---|---|
| 🔴 Overloaded | P95 **above** high threshold | Scale up |
| 🔵 Underutilized | P95 **below** low threshold | Scale down |
| 🟢 OK | Within target band | No action needed |

content.query:
let CPU = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Processor' and Name == 'UtilizationPercentage'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| summarize AvgCPU = round(avg(Val),1), P95CPU = round(percentile(Val,95),1), MaxCPU = round(max(Val),1) by Computer;
let MEM = InsightsMetrics
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Namespace == 'Memory' and Name == 'AvailableMB'
| extend NormalizedComputer = tolower(tostring(split(Computer, '.')[0]))
| where "{SelectedVM}" has "*" or NormalizedComputer in~ ({SelectedVM})
| extend TotalMB = todouble(todynamic(Tags)['vm.azm.ms/memorySizeMB'])
| extend ValMB   = todouble(Val)
| where isnotnull(TotalMB) and TotalMB > 0 and isnotnull(ValMB) and ValMB >= 0
| extend UsedPct = (1.0 - (ValMB / TotalMB)) * 100.0
| extend UsedPct = iff(UsedPct >= 0.0 and UsedPct <= 100.0, UsedPct, real(null))
| where isnotnull(UsedPct)
| summarize AvgMem = round(avg(UsedPct),1), P95Mem = round(percentile(UsedPct,95),1), MaxMem = round(max(UsedPct),1) by Computer;
CPU
| join kind=leftouter MEM on Computer
| extend CPUFlag = case(
    P95CPU > toint('{CpuHighThreshold}'), '🔴 Overloaded',
    P95CPU < toint('{CpuLowThreshold}'),  '🔵 Underutilized',
                                           '🟢 OK')
| extend MemFlag = case(
    P95Mem > toint('{MemHighThreshold}'), '🔴 Overloaded',
    P95Mem < toint('{MemLowThreshold}'),  '🔵 Underutilized',
                                           '🟢 OK')
| extend Recommendation = case(
    CPUFlag == '🔴 Overloaded'    and MemFlag == '🔴 Overloaded',    '🔴 Scale up CPU + Memory',
    CPUFlag == '🔴 Overloaded'    and MemFlag == '🔵 Underutilized', '⚠️ Scale up CPU, reduce Memory',
    CPUFlag == '🔵 Underutilized' and MemFlag == '🔴 Overloaded',    '⚠️ Reduce CPU, scale up Memory',
    CPUFlag == '🔵 Underutilized' and MemFlag == '🔵 Underutilized', '🔵 Downsize VM — CPU + Memory underutilized',
    CPUFlag == '🔴 Overloaded',                                      '🔴 Scale up CPU',
    CPUFlag == '🔵 Underutilized',                                   '🔵 Reduce CPU allocation',
    MemFlag  == '🔴 Overloaded',                                      '🔴 Scale up Memory',
    MemFlag  == '🔵 Underutilized',                                   '🔵 Reduce Memory allocation',
                                                                     '🟢 No action needed')
| where Recommendation != '🟢 No action needed'
| project Computer, AvgCPU, P95CPU, CPUFlag, AvgMem, P95Mem, MemFlag, Recommendation
| order by Recommendation asc, P95CPU desc
content.title: ⚠️ Rightsizing Alerts — VMs Needing Attention
